title: Reasoning and learning about injected concepts in language models
summary: Reasoning and learning about injected concepts in language models
whyItMatters: This work was done as a part of SPAR , under the mentorship of Mirko Bronzi and Damiano Fornasiere. TL;DR We test models' ability to recover information about their activations by injecting steering vectors, and asking the LLMs to verbalize properties of them. We train models with in-context learning and test for three capabilities: Can models identify the…
